title: FIITJEE is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: FIITJEE is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Subject Matter Expert in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
